<div data-cms-block="storefront/product-info" data-attrs=""></div>

![Reception Centerpiece](images/14-reception-centerpiece.jpg)

Not just one arrangement — a whole-room composition. We start with the bridal palette and build down to bud-vase trios for the smaller tables. Setup is included for venues within 30 km.

## What's in it

- Coordinated with bridal palette
- Mix of focal blooms, fillers, greenery
- Setup included within 30 km

## Care

Built day-of, removed by us the morning after.
